verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge provided a clear, evidence-based synthesis. It correctly identified the strongest visual markers (Cryptomeria, utility poles, trellising) and weighted them appropriately to reach the correct conclusion, explicitly eliminating the main alternative (South Korea).
